breakdown: This PR migrates an inline ~200-line polling script for skeptic verification to a reusable workflow reference from an external repository. The change improves modularity and reduces duplication but creates a dependency on an external workflow. The YAML itself is well-structured with clear input passing, but error handling visibility is reduced - the old script's explicit API failure handling and timeout logic is now hidden in the external workflow. No code tests are relevant for this infrastructure change, which accounts for the lower test_coverage score.
key_changes: Replaced ~200 lines of inline 'poll_for_verdict' script with reusable workflow call
Removed detailed API failure handling (rate limits, transport errors, retries)
Changed from inline script to external reusable workflow reference
Passed workflow inputs: pr_number, head_sha, runner_labels, concurrency_group
Inherited secrets for external workflow authentication
